narrative:
Wayne Township (precinct in Pickaway County) has 314 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.4 percentage points.
